ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., American, National) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Central, East, West) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage (W / (W + L)) */,
  "games_behind" TEXT /* Games behind the division leader */,
  "current_streak" TEXT /* Current win or loss streak */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team in the season */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team in the season */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Record of the team at home */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Record of the team away */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Record of the team within the division */,
  "interleague_record" TEXT /* Record of the team in interleague games */,
  "last_10_games" TEXT /* Record of the last 10 games */,
  "magic_number" INTEGER /* Number of wins needed to clinch a playoff spot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "inning_scores" TEXT /* JSON array of inning scores for both teams */,
  "starting_pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the starting pitcher */,
  "opponent_starting_pitcher" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent's starting pitcher */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the stadium's capacity filled */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the game (e.g., rain delay, extra innings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Pitcher, Outfielder) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average of the player (pitchers only) */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player (pitchers only) */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player (pitchers only) */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves by the player (pitchers only) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "batting_side" TEXT /* Player's batting side (right, left, switch) */,
  "throwing_side" TEXT /* Player's throwing side (right, left) */,
  "season_games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "season_at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats in the season */,
  "season_hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits in the season */,
  "season_walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks in the season */,
  "season_strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts in the season */,
  "season_saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves in the season */,
  "season_era" REAL /* Earned run average in the season */,
  "season_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "season_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "season_whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched in the season */,
  "season_innings_pitched" REAL /* Number of innings pitched in the season */,
  "season_hits_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of hits allowed in the season */,
  "season_runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of runs allowed in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is on */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., Manager, Hitting Coach) */,
  "years_with_team" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been with the team */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Coach's nationality */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total career wins */,
  "career_losses" INTEGER /* Total career losses */,
  "career_postseason_wins" INTEGER /* Total career postseason wins */,
  "career_postseason_losses" INTEGER /* Total career postseason losses */,
  "career_championships" INTEGER /* Total career championships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Team Manager, Analyst, Fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object of user preferences (e.g., favorite teams, notifications) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., team standings, player stats) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "regular_season_wins" INTEGER /* Number of regular season wins */,
  "regular_season_losses" INTEGER /* Number of regular season losses */,
  "postseason_wins" INTEGER /* Number of postseason wins */,
  "postseason_losses" INTEGER /* Number of postseason losses */,
  "postseason_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of postseason appearances */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "division_titles" INTEGER /* Number of division titles won */,
  "wild_card_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of wild card appearances */,
  "best_season_record" TEXT /* Best season record */,
  "worst_season_record" TEXT /* Worst season record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
